{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output flags the need for auditing every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The output names one prior work (Chernozhukov et al., 2018) but does not provide a comprehensive list of related works.",
    "R1.7": "The output misses citations that readers will expect, such as Lei & Candès (2021), Vovk et al. (2005), and Foster & Syrgkanis.",
    "RX.1": "The output provides a clear assessment of the priority claim.",
    "RX.3": "The output correctly identifies the contribution as a practical option for CATE uncertainty quantification.",
    "RX.4": "The output identifies issues with marginal miscoverage and subpopulation calibration, but does not provide a concrete solution.",
    "RX.5": "The output misses opportunities to improve prose clarity and structure."
  },
  "recommendations": {
    "R1.3": "Mention the need for auditing every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure in the manuscript.",
    "R1.4": "Expand the 'Related work' subsection to cover the conformal-CATE thread and provide a comprehensive list of related works.",
    "R1.7": "Include missing citations that readers will expect, such as Lei & Candès (2021), Vovk et al. (2005), and Foster & Syrgkanis.",
    "RX.1": "None needed, the priority claim is clear.",
    "RX.3": "None needed, the contribution is identified as a practical option for CATE uncertainty quantification.",
    "RX.4": "Provide a concrete solution for subpopulation calibration in the manuscript.",
    "RX.5": "Improve prose clarity and structure by following the suggested reordering of sections."
  }
}
